#  Delap has joined Aprio
## Proudly announcing that we are now part of Aprio.
[Read more about this exciting news here >](https://www.aprio.com/insights-events/aprio-expands-in-pacific-northwest-uniting-two-leading-oregon-firms-delap-llp-and-hoffman-stewart-schmidt-pc-ins-firmnews/)
# The Delap Difference
## Clarity
Every business tells a story in numbers. Our firm translates your financial history into actionable intelligence for predictability in your business decisions. With our integrated approach, you’ll see your full financial journey in front of you, with Delap by your side every step of the way.
## Confidence
Empowered. Informed. Protected. This is how our clients describe working with us. Our multi-disciplinary team integrates seamlessly with your business to deliver results-driven service and value. Receive the business and financial advice you need across your entire balance sheet to confidently drive your business forward.
# Services
Receive the expertise and resources of a national firm alongside the personal service and responsiveness of a local firm in Portland, Oregon — at Delap, you can have it all.
  * Tax
  * Assurance
  * Business Advisory
  * Wealth Advisory
  * Managed IT Services


![left arrow](https://www.delapcpa.com/wp-content/themes/ht-delap/assets/images/slider-arrow-left.png)
## Managed IT Services
Integrate your technology stack with your business strategy to scale for growth and achieve success. Our IT experts can give you this competitive edge.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/cybersecurity/)
## Tax
Our expert tax teams possess a sophisticated understanding of the tax risks, requirements, and opportunities that affect your business.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/tax/)
## Assurance
Accurate, dependable audits that can improve the availability of capital, aid quality decision making, and increase investor confidence.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/assurance/)
## Business Advisory
Who’s looking out for you? Our advisors use strategic thinking and historical data to guide you through the prospective decisions that impact your bottom line.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/business-advisory/)
## Wealth Advisory
Wealth advisors, tax strategists, and investment managers — all working together to bring clarity and confidence to your financial future.
[Learn More](https://delapwa.com/)
## Managed IT Services
Integrate your technology stack with your business strategy to scale for growth and achieve success. Our IT experts can give you this competitive edge.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/cybersecurity/)
## Tax
Our expert tax teams possess a sophisticated understanding of the tax risks, requirements, and opportunities that affect your business.
[Learn More](https://www.delapcpa.com/services/tax/)
![right arrow](https://www.delapcpa.com/wp-content/themes/ht-delap/assets/images/slider-arrow-right.png)
We’re a member of [Leading Edge Alliance](https://leaglobal.com/index.cfm), extending our Portland, Oregon practice by giving us access to a vast resource pool of tax, accounting, and business specialists in all parts of the U.S. and around the globe.
## What's Your Industry?
Select Industry 
[Automotive](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/automotive/) [Construction](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/construction/) [Financial Institutions](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/financial-institutions/) [Food & Beverage](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/food-beverage/) [Home Builders](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/home-builders/) [Manufacturing](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/manufacturing/) [Real Estate](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/real-estate/) [Retail & Wholesale](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/retail-wholesale/) [Senior Living & Long-Term Care](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/senior-living-long-term-care/) [Software & Technology](https://www.delapcpa.com/industries/software-technology/)
# Guiding Clients Since 1933
Our reputation as a premier firm didn’t happen by chance. It was built one client, one person, and one successful journey at a time.
![left arrow](https://www.delapcpa.com/wp-content/themes/ht-delap/assets/images/slider-arrow-left.png)
## If You Want the Best, Go with Delap
“We have been with Delap for over 10 years. We have a very complex corporate structure and the professionals at Delap have helped us navigate through several year-ends and have consistently exceeded our expectations. If you want the best, go with Delap.”
Gary Edwards, Owner | Chuck Colvin Auto Center
Mike Durbin | Paradise Harley-Davidson
## A Partner in Our Success
“Delap’s team has top-notch expertise, excellent client service, and they go above and beyond to partner with us in our successes. We appreciate working with them on tax implications and opportunities. You couldn’t go wrong with this firm.”
Martha Burroughs | Everett Custom Homes, Inc.
## A Skilled CPA Firm
“Delap has proven to be a responsive, competent and skilled CPA firm whether you need tax, compliance or advisory services.”
Mark Roeter, CFO | Columbia Steel Casting Co., Inc.
Domonic Biggi | Beaverton Foods
## An Asset to Our Company
“Delap has been working with us since 1999, and they have been an asset to our company. Knowledgeable and very hands on to guide our business to where we are today.”
CJ Wetherbee | Integrity Services, Inc.
## If You Want the Best, Go with Delap
“We have been with Delap for over 10 years. We have a very complex corporate structure and the professionals at Delap have helped us navigate through several year-ends and have consistently exceeded our expectations. If you want the best, go with Delap.”
Gary Edwards, Owner | Chuck Colvin Auto Center
Mike Durbin | Paradise Harley-Davidson

## Expect more from your CPA. **Get more with Kernutt Stokes.**
As an Oregon-based accounting and business consulting firm for more than 75 years, we are committed to creating opportunity for our clients _and_ our employees. We believe it’s this dedication that led the firm to being recognized as both a Top 50 Accounting Firm in the country and one of the 100 Best Companies to Work for in Oregon.
[ ![](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/KS-Partner-Group_website-homepage.jpg) Our Team ](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/team) [ ![](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Home-page-services-1.jpg) Our Services ](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/service/) [ ![](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/KS_Industries_382x313.jpg) Industries ](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/industry/) [ ![](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Home-page-resources.jpg) Careers ](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/resource-center)
![](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Awards-logo-for-footer_2026.png)
Kernutt Stokes is proud to be named one of the top 50 Accounting Firms in the country and one of Oregon’s “100 Best Companies to Work For.” [Learn more.](https://www.kernuttstokes.com/awards/)

Small Business Deal Advisors is a discount-commission business brokerage firm that offers the largest inventory of small businesses and franchises for sale in Michigan and throughout the US and Canada. We provide a best-in-class confidential marketing and broker service to business owners who are seeking to sell their small business. We provide professional materials
company.employee_count: and guidance throughout the sale process.
